text: Confirmation Certificate Mr Kiran Narula PO Box 287 SOUTH PERTH WA 6951 Avant Mutual Group Member ID: NARULA005 1301012021202122210212303323012332113 AII.17C.3309744 Mr Kiran Narula Intern/RMO1 Indemnity Insurance Policy 20 November 2015 From 1 January 2017 to 31 December 2017 The maximum sum insured under this policy for any one claim and for all claims in the aggregate in any policy period is $20 million. This includes legal defence costs. The policy is subject to a number of sub-limits, exclusions and deductibles. It only provides cover within the area of practice specified.
